name: lexiklar
description: Offline German dictionary with deep grammar support

scripts.dev: npm run build-index && node scripts/copy-data.js && vite
scripts.build: npm run build-index && node scripts/copy-data.js && vite build
scripts.pipeline: npm run download && npm run download-corpus && npm run transform -- --max-frequency 8000 && npm run enrich && npm run translate && npm run build-index
scripts.pipeline:seed: npm run transform -- --seed && npm run enrich && npm run translate && npm run build-index
